title: perf(fj-dispatch): accelerate rank2 vmap add_one in_axes=1

target.profile_basis: fresh RCH Criterion profile on vmi1227854 after frankenjax-b6vaq landed

candidate.description: exact dispatch-level direct path for rank2 I64 scalar Add with in_axes=1, bypassing BatchTrace setup
candidate.command: RCH_WORKER=vmi1227854 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- dispatch_latency/vmap/rank2_add_one_in_axes_1 --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

isomorphism_proof.details: Focused test compared the direct path against the forced loop-and-stack fallback via [Vmap, Jit] and preserved the existing golden SHA 29d48dbffb8ba3bc95e29416bbe470cd18432ffd471b8ec7ef068c3b7a61b3ef.

validation.details: fails on pre-existing formatting drift in crates/fj-dispatch/src/batching.rs, which was not edited for this rejected lever

next_primitive: Attack the underlying axis-1 transpose/materialization cost with a blocked transpose-map kernel or typed-buffer route; do not repeat BatchTrace-bypass micro-routes for this row.
